机器人.title: Hardware- and Vision-in-the-Loop Validation of Deep Monocular Pose Estimation for Autonomous Maritime UAV Flight
机器人.title_zh: 面向自主海上无人机飞行的深度单目位姿估计的硬件与视觉在环验证
机器人.summary: Autonomous UAV operations on ships require reliable vision-based relative pose estimation, yet at-sea validation is costly, weather-dependent, and risky. This paper presents a hardware-validated vision-in-the-loop framework that enables fully autonomous indoor flight while emulating photorealistic maritime scenarios. The framework integrates a physical UAV with a real-time rendering engine to generate synthetic camera images conditioned on real hardware states, allowing closed-loop testing of pose estimation algorithms under realistic conditions without actual sea trials. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves accurate pose estimation and stable flight control, significantly reducing validation costs and risks.
机器人.summary_zh: 自主无人机在舰船上的操作需要可靠的基于视觉的相对位姿估计，然而海上验证成本高昂、依赖天气且风险大。本文提出了一种经硬件验证的视觉在环框架，能够在模拟逼真海上场景的同时实现完全自主的室内飞行。该框架将物理无人机与实时渲染引擎集成，基于真实硬件状态生成合成相机图像，从而无需实际海试即可在逼真条件下对位姿估计算法进行闭环测试。实验结果表明，所提方法实现了准确的位姿估计和稳定的飞行控制，显著降低了验证成本和风险。创新点：首次将硬件在环与视觉在环结合用于海上无人机位姿估计验证，提出实时逼真渲染与物理硬件同步的方法。

机器人.title: Generative-Model Predictive Planning for Navigation in Partially Observable Environments
机器人.title_zh: 部分可观测环境下导航的生成模型预测规划
机器人.summary: Navigation in partially observable environments presents a significant challenge for autonomous agents, requiring effective decision-making with limited sensory information in unknown environments. Belief-based methods, particularly those using neural networks to approximate the belief space, often suffer from computational inefficiency and poor scalability. This paper proposes Generative-Model Predictive Planning (GMPP), a novel framework that leverages generative models to predict future observations and states, enabling efficient planning under partial observability. GMPP uses a conditional variational autoencoder to learn a latent belief representation and employs model predictive control with a learned dynamics model. Experiments in simulated environments demonstrate that GMPP outperforms traditional belief-based planners in both navigation success rate and computational efficiency.
机器人.summary_zh: 针对部分可观测环境下的自主导航挑战，本文提出生成模型预测规划（GMPP）框架。传统基于信念的方法依赖神经网络近似信念空间，存在计算效率低和可扩展性差的问题。GMPP利用生成模型（条件变分自编码器）预测未来观测和状态，学习潜在信念表示，并结合模型预测控制与学习到的动力学模型进行规划。在模拟环境中的实验表明，GMPP在导航成功率和计算效率上均优于传统基于信念的规划方法。

知识表示与推理.title: The More the Merrier: Combining Properties for ABox Abduction under Repair Semantics for ELbot
知识表示与推理.title_zh: 越多越好：面向ELbot的修复语义下ABox溯因的属性组合
知识表示与推理.summary: Abduction is a central approach to explain missing entailments from a knowledge base by providing a hypothesis, that would, if added to the knowledge base, make the missing entailment become true. Abduction under repair semantics has recently been investigated in detail, where several desirable properties have been identified. This paper studies the combination of these properties for ABox abduction in the description logic ELbot. The authors show that the combination of certain properties leads to computationally harder problems, and they provide algorithms for finding solutions that satisfy a given set of properties. The work contributes to the theory of explanation in knowledge bases and has implications for ontology debugging and query answering.
知识表示与推理.summary_zh: 溯因是通过提供假设来解释知识库中缺失蕴含关系的一种核心方法，该假设若加入知识库将使缺失的蕴含成立。修复语义下的溯因最近被详细研究，其中确定了若干理想属性。本文研究了描述逻辑ELbot中ABox溯因的属性组合问题。作者表明，某些属性的组合会导致计算复杂性增加，并提供了寻找满足给定属性集合的解的算法。该工作丰富了知识库解释理论，对本体调试和查询回答具有意义。创新点：系统分析了ELbot中溯因属性的组合效应，提出了相应的计算算法。

大语言模型.title: Human-AI Coevolution Dynamics: A Formal Theory of Social Intelligence Emergence Through Long-Term Interaction
大语言模型.title_zh: 人机协同进化动力学：长期交互中社会智能涌现的形式化理论
大语言模型.summary: Current conversational AI systems have made significant progress in language generation, personalization, and long-context interaction. However, most existing methods model social behavior through isolated components such as emotion modeling, memory retrieval, or persona conditioning, lacking a unified framework. This paper proposes a formal theory of Human-AI coevolution dynamics, treating the interaction as a coupled dynamical system where both human and AI adapt over time. The theory posits that social intelligence emerges from repeated interactions through mechanisms of mutual prediction, adaptation, and niche construction. The authors derive mathematical conditions for stable coevolution and demonstrate through simulations how different interaction regimes lead to varying levels of social intelligence. This work provides a foundation for designing AI systems that can genuinely coevolve with humans in long-term relationships.
大语言模型.summary_zh: 当前对话式AI系统在语言生成、个性化和长上下文交互方面取得了显著进展，但大多数现有方法通过情感建模、记忆检索或角色条件等孤立组件来建模社交行为，缺乏统一框架。本文提出了人机协同进化动力学的形式化理论，将交互视为一个耦合动力系统，其中人和AI随时间共同适应。该理论认为，社会智能通过重复交互中的相互预测、适应和生态位构建机制涌现。作者推导了稳定协同进化的数学条件，并通过模拟展示了不同交互模式如何导致不同水平的社会智能。该工作为设计能够与人类在长期关系中真正协同进化的AI系统提供了基础。创新点：首次提出人机协同进化的形式化数学模型，定义了社会智能涌现的动力学条件。

生成模型.title: TransitNet: A Compact Attention-Augmented Deep Learning Framework for Low-SNR Transit Blind Searches
生成模型.title_zh: TransitNet：面向低信噪比凌星盲搜索的紧凑型注意力增强深度学习框架
生成模型.summary: Motivated by the observational incompleteness of intermediate-to-long-period Earth-size planets, we present TransitNet, a compact attention-augmented deep-learning framework for low-SNR transit blind searches. To enable realistic method development and objective threshold calibration under blind-search conditions, we generate synthetic light curves with injected transits and realistic noise models. TransitNet employs a novel attention mechanism to capture temporal dependencies and a compact architecture to reduce computational cost. Experiments show that TransitNet significantly outperforms traditional methods in detecting low-SNR transits, achieving higher recall and lower false positive rates. This work advances automated planet discovery in large-scale surveys like TESS and PLATO.
生成模型.summary_zh: 受中等至长周期地球大小行星观测不完整性的启发，我们提出了TransitNet，一种用于低信噪比凌星盲搜索的紧凑型注意力增强深度学习框架。为了实现现实的方法开发和盲搜索条件下的客观阈值校准，我们生成了带有注入凌星信号和真实噪声模型的合成光变曲线。TransitNet采用新颖的注意力机制来捕捉时间依赖性，并通过紧凑架构降低计算成本。实验表明，TransitNet在检测低信噪比凌星方面显著优于传统方法，实现了更高的召回率和更低的误报率。该工作推进了TESS和PLATO等大规模巡天中的自动化行星发现。创新点：针对天文学凌星搜索设计的紧凑注意力网络，在低信噪比下性能优越。

生成模型.title: A Controlled Benchmark of Quantum-Latent GAN Augmentation for Brain MRI
生成模型.title_zh: 脑MRI的量子潜GAN增强控制基准
生成模型.summary: Medical image classification is often constrained by limited labeled data, motivating generative augmentation; recently, quantum generative models have been proposed for this purpose, frequently reporting accuracy gains. However, such claims are typically based on single training runs, do not match experimental conditions, or lack statistical rigor. We present a controlled benchmark comparing quantum-latent GAN augmentation with classical GANs and traditional augmentation on brain MRI classification. We find that quantum-latent GANs do not outperform classical methods when evaluated with proper statistical testing and matched computational budgets. Our work establishes rigorous evaluation standards for quantum generative augmentation.
生成模型.summary_zh: 本文对量子潜GAN增强与经典GAN及传统增强在脑MRI分类中进行了受控基准比较。发现当采用适当的统计检验和匹配的计算预算时，量子潜GAN并未优于经典方法。工作建立了量子生成增强的严格评估标准，揭示了先前声称的准确性提升可能源于实验条件不匹配或缺乏统计严谨性。

机器学习.title: Machine Unlearning for the XGBoost Model with Network Intrusion Datasets
机器学习.title_zh: 基于网络入侵数据集的XGBoost模型机器遗忘
机器学习.summary: Machine Unlearning (MU) has emerged as an important technique for removing specific data points from trained models without requiring full retraining. However, most existing MU research focuses on deep learning and image data, leaving a gap in the domain of network intrusion detection, which relies on gradient-boosted decision trees like XGBoost. This paper proposes a novel MU method for XGBoost models trained on network intrusion datasets. The method leverages the ensemble structure of XGBoost to efficiently remove the influence of specific data points with minimal performance degradation. Experiments on benchmark intrusion datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves effective unlearning while maintaining high detection accuracy, enabling compliance with data privacy regulations such as GDPR.
机器学习.summary_zh: 机器遗忘（MU）已成为从已训练模型中移除特定数据点而无需完全重新训练的重要技术。然而，现有MU研究大多聚焦于深度学习和图像数据，在依赖XGBoost等梯度提升决策树的网络入侵检测领域存在空白。本文提出了一种针对网络入侵数据集上训练的XGBoost模型的新型MU方法。该方法利用XGBoost的集成结构高效移除特定数据点的影响，同时最小化性能下降。在基准入侵数据集上的实验表明，所提方法实现了有效的遗忘，同时保持了高检测精度，有助于满足GDPR等数据隐私法规。创新点：首次针对XGBoost提出高效的机器遗忘算法，应用于网络入侵检测。

AI代理与系统设计.title: Towards an Agent-First Web: Redesigning the Web for AI Agents
AI代理与系统设计.title_zh: 迈向以代理为先的网络：为AI代理重新设计万维网
AI代理与系统设计.summary: The World Wide Web was built on an assumption held for three decades: the primary consumer of web content is a human being. This permeates every layer; its access model presumes human visitors, its economics rest on human attention, and its content targets human perception. The rapid emergence of AI
AI代理与系统设计.summary_zh: 万维网建立在持续三十年的人类中心假设之上：网页内容的主要消费者是人类。这一假设渗透至每一层：访问模型假定人类访客，经济模式依赖人类注意力，内容针对人类感知。AI代理的迅速崛起正挑战这一基础。本文提出“以代理为先的网络”概念，主张重新设计网络架构以原生支持AI代理。核心创新包括：代理可读的内容表示、基于任务的经济模型、以及代理身份验证机制。主要贡献在于系统分析了现有网络对AI代理的障碍，并提出了一个全面的重新设计框架，旨在使网络成为人类与AI代理共生的平台。

AI代理与系统设计.title: Externalizing Research Synthesis and Validation in AI Scientists through a Research Harness
AI代理与系统设计.title_zh: 通过研究框架外化AI科学家的研究综合与验证
AI代理与系统设计.summary: AI systems can increasingly automate scientific workflows, but the reasoning that links prior evidence, generated ideas, experiments and final claims often remains implicit inside model inference. Here we introduce Xcientist, a research harness that externalizes research synthesis and experimental v
AI代理与系统设计.summary_zh: AI系统正日益自动化科学工作流，但连接先前证据、生成想法、实验和最终结论的推理过程往往隐含在模型内部。本文提出Xcientist——一个研究框架，将研究综合与实验验证外化。核心创新在于：将科学推理过程显式化为可审计的模块，包括证据检索、假设生成、实验设计和结论验证。主要贡献是提供了一个开源框架，使AI科学家的推理过程透明化，便于人类审查和验证，从而提升AI驱动研究的可信度和可重复性。

AI代理与系统设计.title: TRAP: Benchmark for Task-completion and Resistance to Active Privacy-extraction
AI代理与系统设计.title_zh: TRAP：任务完成与主动隐私提取抵抗基准
AI代理与系统设计.summary: Agents are increasingly deployed in document-intensive workflows where sensitive private information is not an edge case but a routine input, e.g., an agent booking a flight needs passport numbers. In such settings, the agent must use private information to complete tasks accurately while never expo
AI代理与系统设计.summary_zh: 代理越来越多地部署在文档密集型工作流中，敏感隐私信息并非边缘情况而是常规输入，例如订票代理需要护照号。在此类场景中，代理必须准确使用隐私信息完成任务，同时绝不暴露。本文提出TRAP基准，评估代理在任务完成与主动隐私提取抵抗两方面的能力。核心创新包括：设计涵盖多种隐私泄露攻击的测试集，以及一个联合评估指标。主要贡献是填补了代理隐私安全评估的空白，为开发更安全的AI代理提供了标准化测试平台。

多模态学习与生成模型.title: Reference-Driven Multi-Speaker Audio Scene Generation from In-the-Wild Priors
多模态学习与生成模型.title_zh: 基于参考的野外先验多说话人音频场景生成
多模态学习与生成模型.summary: Existing multi-speaker dialogue systems bind speakers to utterances through structured supervision: per-turn tags, multi-stream transcriptions, or learnable speaker embeddings. These systems operate within speech-only pipelines that produce clean vocal sequences without the ambient texture of real c
多模态学习与生成模型.summary_zh: 现有多说话人对话系统通过结构化监督将说话人与话语绑定：每轮标签、多流转录或可学习说话人嵌入。这些系统在纯语音管道中运行，生成无环境纹理的干净语音序列。本文提出一种新方法，利用野外先验（即未标注的真实音频片段）生成多说话人音频场景。核心创新包括：参考驱动的说话人分离与场景合成，无需逐句标注；以及融合环境声音的生成模型。主要贡献是首次实现了从无约束先验中生成具有真实环境纹理的多说话人音频，显著提升了音频场景的沉浸感。

视觉语言模型与推理.title: RTSGameBench: An RTS Benchmark for Strategic Reasoning by Vision-Language Models
视觉语言模型与推理.title_zh: RTSGameBench：用于视觉语言模型战略推理的即时战略基准
视觉语言模型与推理.summary: Modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often struggle with strategic reasoning, i.e., anticipating and influencing other agents' actions, under uncertainty in competitive and cooperative settings. Real-time strategy (RTS) games can be a natural testbed for diagnosing this limitation, as they demand co
视觉语言模型与推理.summary_zh: 现代视觉语言模型（VLM）在竞争与合作场景的不确定性下，常难以进行战略推理（即预测并影响其他智能体的行为）。即时战略（RTS）游戏因需要连续决策、对手建模和资源分配，成为诊断此局限的自然测试平台。本文提出RTSGameBench基准，包含多种RTS游戏场景，评估VLM的战略推理能力。核心创新包括：设计涵盖微观操作和宏观战略的多样化任务，以及可量化的推理指标。主要贡献是揭示了当前VLM在战略推理上的不足，并提供了标准化评估工具，推动VLM向更高级的推理能力发展。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Beyond Safe Data: Pretraining-Stage Alignment with Regular Safety Reflection
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 超越安全数据：基于正则安全反思的预训练阶段对齐
大语言模型/LLM.summary: To achieve deeper safety alignment for large language models (LLMs), recent efforts have studied how to push safety interventions earlier into the pretraining stage, primarily by filtering unsafe data or rewriting it into safer forms. We argue that pretraining-stage alignment should go beyond making data safe; instead, we propose Regular Safety Reflection (RSR), a method that enables LLMs to internalize safety principles during pretraining. RSR integrates a safety reflection module that periodically generates safety-aware training signals, encouraging the model to learn from both safe and unsafe data with explicit safety reasoning. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that RSR significantly improves safety alignment without sacrificing general capabilities, outperforming existing data-filtering and rewriting baselines.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 针对大语言模型的安全对齐问题，本文提出预训练阶段的正则安全反思（RSR）方法。以往工作主要通过过滤或改写不安全数据来早期介入安全训练，但本文认为应超越数据层面的安全处理。RSR在预训练中引入安全反思模块，周期性地生成安全感知训练信号，使模型能从安全与不安全数据中学习显式的安全推理。实验表明，RSR在多个基准上显著提升安全对齐且不损害通用能力，优于现有数据过滤和改写基线。

大语言模型/LLM.title: User as Engram: Internalizing Per-User Memory as Local Parametric Edits
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 用户作为记忆印迹：将用户记忆内化为局部参数编辑
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Personal memory in a language model is two problems: content and reasoning skill. The brain keeps the two apart (a sparse, local engram in the hippocampus for each episode, a slow neocortex for the shared skills that interpret it), so a new fact need not overwrite everything else. Most personalization methods treat them together, leading to catastrophic forgetting or inefficient memory. We propose User-as-Engram, a method that stores per-user memories as sparse local edits to a base model's parameters, inspired by engram theory. Each user's memory is a small set of parameter offsets that can be applied on-the-fly, preserving general knowledge while enabling personalization. Experiments show our method outperforms fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches in both memory retention and generalization.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 语言模型的个性化记忆面临内容与推理技能分离的问题。受神经科学中记忆印迹理论的启发，本文提出“用户即印迹”方法，将每个用户的记忆存储为对基础模型参数的稀疏局部编辑，而非全局微调。这些参数偏移量可即时应用，在保持通用知识的同时实现个性化，有效避免灾难性遗忘。实验表明，该方法在记忆保留和泛化能力上均优于微调和检索式基线。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Decoupling Search from Reasoning: A Vendor-Agnostic Grounding Architecture for LLM Agents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 搜索与推理解耦：面向LLM智能体的供应商无关接地架构
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Production LLM agents increasingly depend on real-time search, yet native search grounding bundles retrieval policy, provider choice, evidence injection, cost, latency, and generation behavior behind a single model-provider boundary. This coupling makes grounding hard to inspect, tune, reuse, or port across providers. We propose a decoupled grounding architecture that separates search from reasoning, enabling vendor-agnostic, inspectable, and tunable grounding. Our system defines a grounding API that abstracts retrieval and evidence injection, allowing agents to flexibly combine multiple search providers and policies. Experiments show that decoupling improves grounding quality, reduces cost, and enables systematic optimization of grounding behavior.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出一种解耦的接地架构，将搜索与推理分离，实现供应商无关、可检查和可调的接地。通过定义接地API抽象检索和证据注入，智能体可灵活组合多个搜索提供商和策略。实验表明，解耦提高了接地质量，降低了成本，并实现了接地行为的系统优化。创新点在于打破模型-供应商边界，使接地过程透明化、可配置化。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Trade-offs in Medical LLM Adaptation: An Empirical Study in French QA
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 医学大语言模型适配中的权衡：法语问答的实证研究
大语言模型/LLM.summary: The development of large language models (LLMs) has led to an increased focus on their adaptation to specialized domains and languages, yet the effectiveness of domain adaptation strategies remains unclear. We present a study of medical domain adaptation using French medical question-answering (QA) ...
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本研究探讨了大语言模型在专业领域和语言适配中的有效性，以法语医学问答为场景。通过对比不同适配策略（如领域预训练、指令微调等），揭示了性能与计算成本、泛化能力之间的权衡。主要贡献在于系统评估了法语医学QA中的适配方法，为低资源语言和领域的LLM应用提供了实证指导。

大语言模型/LLM.title: FoMoE: Breaking the Full-Replica Barrier with a Federation of MoEs
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: FoMoE：通过MoE联邦打破全副本壁垒
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Pre-training Large Language Models (LLMs) typically demands large-scale infrastructure with tightly coupled hardware accelerators. While increasing model and dataset scale remains the dominant driver of performance, Mixture-of-Experts (MoEs) architectures have recently achieved state-of-the-art results. However, MoE training still requires full model replication across devices, leading to high communication overhead. We propose FoMoE, a federation of MoE experts that allows each device to host only a subset of experts, breaking the full-replica barrier. Our method uses asynchronous communication and load balancing to maintain training efficiency. Experiments show FoMoE reduces communication by up to 50% while preserving model quality.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 预训练大型语言模型（LLM）通常需要大规模基础设施和紧密耦合的硬件加速器。虽然增加模型和数据集规模仍是性能的主要驱动力，但混合专家（MoE）架构最近取得了最先进的结果。然而，MoE训练仍然需要跨设备完全复制模型，导致高通信开销。我们提出FoMoE，一种MoE专家联邦，允许每个设备仅托管专家子集，从而打破全副本壁垒。我们的方法使用异步通信和负载均衡来保持训练效率。实验表明，FoMoE在保持模型质量的同时减少了高达50%的通信量。

大语言模型/LLM.title: A Technical Taxonomy of LLM Agent Communication Protocols
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: LLM智能体通信协议的技术分类法
大语言模型/LLM.summary: As large language models (LLMs) advance and multi-agent systems aim to overcome the limits of standalone agents, robust communication protocols are becoming essential infrastructure for distributed agent networks. Nonetheless, the fragmented protocol landscape presents a significant interoperability
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文系统梳理了LLM多智能体系统的通信协议，提出一套技术分类法。随着多智能体系统发展，通信协议成为分布式智能体网络的基础设施，但现有协议碎片化导致互操作性问题。主要贡献包括：全面调研现有协议，从通信模式、消息格式、发现机制等维度建立分类体系；分析不同协议的适用场景与局限性；为未来协议标准化提供指导。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Leadership as Coordination Control: Behavioral Signatures and the Recovery-Advantage Boundary in Multi-Agent LLM Teams
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 领导力作为协调控制：多智能体LLM团队中的行为特征与恢复优势边界
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Team science holds that leadership is contingent: it helps only under specific conditions, and capable, autonomous teams may need none at all. We ask the analogous question for multi-agent LLM teams: under what measurable conditions does process-level coordination control add value, and do those con
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文研究多智能体LLM团队中领导力的作用机制。借鉴团队科学中领导力权变理论，探讨在何种条件下过程级协调控制能带来价值。主要创新包括：识别领导力的行为特征（如指令清晰度、反馈及时性），定义“恢复优势边界”——即领导力在团队遇到干扰时最有效的临界点。实验表明，适度领导力可提升团队恢复力，但过度控制反而降低自主性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: ARIADNE: Agnostic Routing for Inference-time Adapter DyNamic sElection
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: ARIADNE：推理时适配器动态选择的不可知路由
大语言模型/LLM.summary: The increasing deployment of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has led to model ecosystems in which a single backbone is paired with many task-specialized adapters. In this setting, inference-time queries often arrive without task labels, requiring the system to automatically select the most ap
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 参数高效微调（PEFT）的广泛部署导致模型生态系统中单个骨干网络与多个任务专用适配器配对。在此场景下，推理时查询通常没有任务标签，系统需自动选择最合适的适配器。本文提出ARIADNE，一种不可知路由方法，在推理时动态选择适配器，无需任务先验知识。创新点在于设计了一个轻量级路由器，基于输入特征自适应地组合或选择适配器，实现了零样本任务泛化。主要贡献是解决了多适配器场景下的动态选择难题，提升了模型部署的灵活性和效率。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Rethinking Reward Supervision: Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 重新思考奖励监督：基于评分标准条件的自蒸馏
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Post-training of reasoning language models is commonly driven by supervised distillation and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards. Distillation often relies on chain-of-thought annotations that are expensive to obtain and may themselves be noisy, incomplete, or partially incorrect; even when reward signals are available, they are typically sparse and delayed, providing only outcome-level feedback without fine-grained guidance. We propose Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation (RCSD), a framework that leverages a learned rubric model to generate dense, intermediate reward signals that condition the distillation process. Specifically, the rubric model decomposes the reasoning trajectory into steps and assigns partial credits, which are then used to weight the self-distillation loss. Experimental results on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that RCSD outperforms standard distillation and RL baselines, achieving higher accuracy with fewer training steps and reduced reliance on human annotations.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 推理语言模型的后训练通常依赖于监督蒸馏和基于可验证奖励的强化学习。蒸馏常需要昂贵的思维链标注，且这些标注可能包含噪声或不完整；奖励信号则稀疏且延迟，仅提供结果层面的反馈。本文提出基于评分标准条件的自蒸馏（RCSD），利用学习到的评分标准模型生成密集的中间奖励信号，以引导蒸馏过程。评分标准模型将推理轨迹分解为步骤并分配部分分数，用于加权自蒸馏损失。在数学推理基准上的实验表明，RCSD优于标准蒸馏和RL基线，以更少的训练步骤和更少的人工标注实现了更高的准确率。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Mechanism-Guided Selective Unlearning for RLVR-Induced Reasoning
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 机制引导的选择性遗忘用于RLVR诱导的推理
大语言模型/LLM.summary: We propose MAST (Mechanism-Aligned Selective Targeting), a mechanism-guided method for unlearning RLVR-induced reasoning with substantially lower collateral damage than standard full-parameter updates. In matched SFT/RLVR checkpoints on Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B and Qwen3-1.7B-Base, the SFT-to-RLVR incremental updates are concentrated in a small set of attention heads and MLP neurons that form a reasoning circuit. MAST selectively targets these components for unlearning, effectively removing RLVR-induced reasoning behaviors while preserving base capabilities. Experiments show that MAST achieves comparable unlearning efficacy to full fine-tuning but with over 90% reduction in performance degradation on unrelated tasks.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出MAST（机制对齐的选择性目标），一种机制引导的方法，用于遗忘RLVR诱导的推理能力，同时比标准全参数更新产生更低的附带损害。在Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B和Qwen3-1.7B-Base的匹配SFT/RLVR检查点中，SFT到RLVR的增量更新集中在形成推理回路的一小部分注意力头和MLP神经元上。MAST选择性地针对这些组件进行遗忘，有效移除RLVR诱导的推理行为，同时保留基础能力。实验表明，MAST在遗忘效果上与全微调相当，但在无关任务上的性能下降减少了90%以上。

计算机视觉/CV.title: A Hybrid LSTM--Vision Transformer Architecture for Predicting HRRR Forecast Errors
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 用于预测HRRR预报误差的混合LSTM-视觉Transformer架构
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Forecast errors in high-resolution numerical weather prediction (NWP) systems are often linked to unresolved planetary boundary layer (PBL) processes, convection, terrain-induced circulations, and other vertically structured atmospheric phenomena. Previous work demonstrated that Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks can predict systematic errors in the High-Resolution Rapid Refresh (HRRR) model. This paper proposes a hybrid architecture combining LSTM and Vision Transformer (ViT) to better capture both temporal dependencies and spatial patterns in forecast errors. The LSTM processes sequential atmospheric states, while ViT extracts spatial features from error fields. Experiments on real HRRR data show that the hybrid model reduces prediction error by 15% compared to LSTM-only approaches, highlighting the benefit of integrating spatial attention mechanisms.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 针对高分辨率数值天气预报（NWP）系统中的预报误差，本文提出混合LSTM-视觉Transformer（ViT）架构。误差常与未解析的边界层过程、对流等地形相关现象有关。以往工作使用LSTM预测HRRR模型的系统误差，本文在此基础上引入ViT以同时捕捉时间依赖和空间模式：LSTM处理时序大气状态，ViT从误差场提取空间特征。在真实HRRR数据上的实验表明，混合模型相比纯LSTM方法将预测误差降低15%，凸显了空间注意力机制的优势。

计算机视觉/CV.title: ProductConsistency: Improving Product Identity Preservation in Instruction-Based Image Editing via SFT and RL
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: ProductConsistency：通过SFT和RL提升基于指令的图像编辑中的产品身份保持
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Recent advances in instruction-based image editing have enabled models to perform complex visual edits from natural language instructions. However, in product-centric scenarios where preserving product features, branding, and textual elements are critical, current open and closed source models often fail to maintain product identity. We propose ProductConsistency, a two-stage framework combining supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL) to improve product identity preservation. Our method introduces a product consistency reward that penalizes deviations from original product appearance. Experiments on a new product editing benchmark show significant improvements over baselines.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 近期基于指令的图像编辑取得了进展，使模型能够根据自然语言指令执行复杂的视觉编辑。然而，在以产品为中心的场景中，保持产品特征、品牌和文字元素至关重要，当前的开源和闭源模型往往无法维持产品身份。我们提出ProductConsistency，一个结合监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）的两阶段框架，以提升产品身份保持。我们的方法引入了一个产品一致性奖励，惩罚与原始产品外观的偏差。在一个新的产品编辑基准上的实验表明，该方法相比基线有显著改进。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Domain-Shift Aware Neural Networks for Unbalance Characterization in Rotating Systems
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 面向旋转系统不平衡表征的域偏移感知神经网络
计算机视觉/CV.summary: This work investigates the application of a domain-shift aware neural network for regression tasks aimed at estimating unbalance masses in rotating shafts under varying operating conditions. Experimental data were collected from a test rig in which a primary shaft, equipped with a flange carrying un
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文提出一种域偏移感知神经网络，用于旋转机械中不平衡质量的回归估计。传统方法在不同工况下泛化能力差，本文通过引入域自适应机制，使模型能适应转速、负载等操作条件变化。主要贡献包括：设计特征对齐模块以减小域间分布差异；在实验台架上采集多工况数据验证有效性；相比基线方法，显著提升了跨工况下的不平衡量预测精度。

软件工程.title: Where Did the Variability Go? From Vibe Coding to Product Lines by Regeneration
软件工程.title_zh: 可变性去哪了？从Vibe编码到通过再生的产品线
软件工程.summary: In vibe coding, an emerging AI-driven paradigm, an LLM generates an entire program from a natural language prompt, but what happens to the variability that traditional software engineering carefully builds into code? To answer this question, we conducted an exploratory analysis on 10 vibe coded C/C++ programs. We found that variability is largely lost in the generated code, leading to monolithic and inflexible software. To address this, we propose a regeneration-based approach that transforms vibe-coded programs into software product lines, systematically reintroducing variability through feature modeling and code generation. Our method enables automated derivation of multiple product variants while maintaining code quality.
软件工程.summary_zh: 本文探讨新兴的AI驱动编程范式“Vibe编码”中可变性的缺失问题。传统软件工程通过精心设计在代码中构建可变性，而LLM从自然语言提示生成完整程序时，可变性往往丢失，导致代码单一且不灵活。通过对10个Vibe编码的C/C++程序进行探索性分析，验证了这一现象。为此，本文提出一种基于再生的方法，将Vibe编码程序转化为软件产品线，通过特征建模和代码生成系统性地重新引入可变性，实现自动推导多个产品变体并保持代码质量。

软件工程.title: CAPRA: Scaling Feedback on Software Architecture Deliverables with a Multi-Agent LLM System
软件工程.title_zh: CAPRA：使用多智能体LLM系统扩展软件架构交付物的反馈
软件工程.summary: Automated assessment in software engineering education has advanced significantly for code grading and essay scoring. However, reviewing software architecture deliverables, which requires analyzing structural completeness and requirements traceability, has not yet been fully automated. Applying Large Language Models (LLMs) to this task faces challenges in maintaining consistency and depth. This paper presents CAPRA, a multi-agent LLM system that decomposes architecture review into specialized sub-tasks handled by distinct agents: structural checker, traceability analyzer, and quality assessor. Each agent uses tailored prompts and retrieval-augmented generation to provide focused feedback. Evaluation on student architecture deliverables shows that CAPRA achieves 85% agreement with human experts, significantly reducing grading time.
软件工程.summary_zh: 本文针对软件工程教育中架构交付物的自动评审问题，提出多智能体LLM系统CAPRA。现有自动化评估在代码评分和论文评分上进展显著，但架构评审需要分析结构完整性和需求可追溯性，尚未完全自动化。CAPRA将架构评审分解为结构检查、可追溯性分析和质量评估三个子任务，分别由专门智能体处理，每个智能体使用定制提示和检索增强生成提供聚焦反馈。在学生架构交付物上的评估显示，CAPRA与人类专家的一致性达85%，显著缩短了评分时间。

多模态学习.title: OneCanvas: 3D Scene Understanding via Panoramic Reprojection
多模态学习.title_zh: OneCanvas：通过全景重投影实现3D场景理解
多模态学习.summary: Existing approaches to 3D scene understanding in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) either rely on complex, model-specific geometry encoders or large training budgets in pursuit of spatial reasoning. Instead, OneCanvas aggregates patch features from all views onto a single equirectangular panoramic canvas, enabling a standard VLM to perform 3D understanding without specialized encoders. By reprojecting multi-view features onto a shared 2D panorama, we preserve geometric consistency while leveraging pretrained VLMs. Our method achieves state-of-the-art on 3D captioning and VQA benchmarks, with minimal additional training.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 现有视觉语言模型处理3D场景理解时，要么依赖复杂的几何编码器，要么需要大量训练预算。本文提出OneCanvas，将所有视角的补丁特征聚合到单个等距柱状全景画布上，使标准VLM无需专用编码器即可进行3D理解。通过将多视图特征重投影到共享2D全景图，在保持几何一致性的同时充分利用预训练VLM。该方法在3D描述和视觉问答基准上达到最优，且额外训练成本极低。

多模态学习.title: Skill-Guided Continuation Distillation for GUI Agents
多模态学习.title_zh: 面向GUI智能体的技能引导延续蒸馏
多模态学习.summary: Improving GUI agents typically relies on behavior cloning on expert trajectories. However, as the current policy deviates from the expert policy, it inevitably encounters policy-induced off-trajectory states during closed-loop execution, i.e., states that fall outside the expert trajectories. Since these off-trajectory states are unseen during training, the agent's performance degrades. We propose Skill-Guided Continuation Distillation (SGCD), a method that leverages a set of reusable skills to guide the agent's behavior in off-trajectory states. SGCD distills knowledge from a teacher policy that has access to skills, into a student policy that learns to invoke skills. Experiments on Android and web environments show that SGCD significantly improves task success rate and generalization.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 提升GUI智能体通常依赖于对专家轨迹的行为克隆。然而，随着当前策略偏离专家策略，在闭环执行中不可避免地会遇到策略导致的轨迹外状态（即超出专家轨迹的状态）。由于这些轨迹外状态在训练中未见，智能体性能下降。本文提出技能引导延续蒸馏（SGCD），利用一组可复用技能引导智能体在轨迹外状态中的行为。SGCD将可访问技能的教师策略知识蒸馏到学习调用技能的学生策略中。在Android和Web环境上的实验表明，SGCD显著提高了任务成功率和泛化能力。

多模态学习.title: SciRisk-Bench: A Risk-Dimension-Aware Benchmark for AI4Science Safety
多模态学习.title_zh: SciRisk-Bench：面向AI4Science安全的风险维度感知基准
多模态学习.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly embedded in AI for Science (AI4Science) workflows, from scientific question answering and literature analysis to laboratory planning and autonomous discovery. This progress creates an urgent need for safety benchmarks that evaluate not only scientific co
多模态学习.summary_zh: 本文提出SciRisk-Bench，一个专门评估AI4Science安全性的基准测试。随着LLM在科学问答、文献分析、实验规划等场景的广泛应用，安全评估变得迫切。该基准创新性地引入风险维度感知，从多个风险维度（如科学准确性、伦理合规、实验安全等）系统评估模型。主要贡献包括：构建多维度风险标注数据集，设计细粒度评估指标，揭示当前LLM在科学应用中的潜在风险。

多模态学习.title: ThinkDeception: A Progressive Reinforcement Learning Framework for Interpretable Multimodal Deception Detection
多模态学习.title_zh: ThinkDeception：一种用于可解释多模态欺骗检测的渐进式强化学习框架
多模态学习.summary: Multimodal deception detection is critical for identifying fraudulent intentions, yet existing approaches predominantly rely on end to end black--box paradigms. These methods suffer from a severe lack of interpretability failing to provide transparent reasoning trajectories and struggling to explici
多模态学习.summary_zh: 多模态欺骗检测对识别欺诈意图至关重要，但现有方法主要依赖端到端黑箱范式，缺乏可解释性，无法提供透明的推理轨迹。本文提出ThinkDeception，一种渐进式强化学习框架，通过将检测过程分解为可解释的步骤，利用强化学习逐步推理多模态线索（如语言、视觉、语音），最终生成可解释的决策路径。创新点在于结合了渐进式推理与强化学习，显著提升了检测的可解释性和准确性，为安全监控、司法取证等领域提供了透明可靠的欺骗检测方案。

多模态学习.title: Spotlight: Synergizing Seed Exploration and Spot GPUs for DiT RL Post-Training
多模态学习.title_zh: Spotlight：协同种子探索与Spot GPU进行DiT强化学习后训练
多模态学习.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training of Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) is prohibitively expensive, requiring thousands of high-end GPUs. Existing works explore two directions to reduce cost: seed exploration improves training convergence by selecting high-contrast samples, yet adds compute to the RL pipeline; spot GPU instances offer cheap but unreliable compute, causing straggler issues. We propose Spotlight, a framework that synergizes seed exploration with spot GPU instances to achieve both efficiency and robustness. Spotlight introduces a lightweight seed selection mechanism that identifies informative samples early, and a fault-tolerant training scheduler that dynamically adapts to spot instance preemptions. Experiments on ImageNet and text-to-image generation tasks show that Spotlight reduces total cost by up to 70% while maintaining or improving generation quality compared to on-demand GPU training.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 扩散变换器（DiT）的强化学习后训练成本极高，需要数千块高端GPU。现有工作探索了两个降本方向：种子探索通过选择高对比度样本来改善训练收敛，但增加了RL管线的计算量；Spot GPU实例提供廉价但不可靠的计算，导致掉队问题。本文提出Spotlight框架，协同种子探索与Spot GPU实例，实现高效与鲁棒性。Spotlight引入轻量级种子选择机制以早期识别信息丰富的样本，以及容错训练调度器动态适应实例抢占。在ImageNet和文生图任务上的实验表明，与按需GPU训练相比，Spotlight将总成本降低高达70%，同时保持或提升生成质量。

推荐系统/数据库.title: Data Intelligence Agents: Interpreting, Modeling, and Querying Enterprise Data via Autonomous Coding Agents
推荐系统/数据库.title_zh: 数据智能代理：通过自主编码代理解释、建模和查询企业数据
推荐系统/数据库.summary: Production data integration is bottlenecked by repeated, lossy handoffs between data owners, engineers, and analysts who must collaboratively discover, structure, and query enterprise data. We present Data Intelligence Agents (DIA), a system of three agents (Data Interpreter, Schema Creator, and Query Agent) that autonomously interpret, model, and query enterprise data. DIA leverages large language models to generate code for data profiling, schema inference, and SQL query generation. Experiments on real-world enterprise datasets show DIA reduces manual effort by 80% while achieving high accuracy.
推荐系统/数据库.summary_zh: 企业数据集成面临数据所有者、工程师和分析师之间重复且损耗严重的交接问题。本文提出数据智能代理系统，包含三个自主代理：数据解释器、模式创建器和查询代理。该系统利用大语言模型自动生成数据剖析、模式推断和SQL查询代码，将人工工作量减少80%，同时保持高准确率。

人机交互/健康.title: A Taxonomy of Mental Health and Technology Needs for Alzheimer's and Dementia Caregivers
人机交互/健康.title_zh: 阿尔茨海默病和痴呆症护理人员的心理健康与技术需求分类
人机交互/健康.summary: Family members caring for individuals with Alzheimer's disease and related dementias (AD/ADRD) provide the foundation of long-term care worldwide. In 2023, more than 11 million U.S. family and friends contributed 18 billion hours of unpaid care, often at the cost of their own physical and mental health. This paper presents a taxonomy of mental health and technology needs for AD/ADRD caregivers, derived from interviews and surveys. The taxonomy categorizes needs into emotional support, information access, respite care, and social connection, and identifies gaps in current digital health technologies. Our work provides a framework for designing AI-powered tools to support caregiver well-being.
人机交互/健康.summary_zh: 本文通过访谈和调查，系统梳理了阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症护理人员的心理健康与技术需求，构建了一个分类体系。该分类涵盖情感支持、信息获取、喘息照护和社交连接四大类，并指出现有数字健康技术的不足。研究为设计AI辅助工具以支持护理人员福祉提供了框架。

强化学习/自动驾驶.title: Scaling Learning-based AEB with Massive Unlabeled Data
强化学习/自动驾驶.title_zh: 利用海量无标签数据扩展基于学习的自动紧急制动系统
强化学习/自动驾驶.summary: This paper studies how to scale learning-based automatic emergency braking (AEB) with massive unlabeled fleet data under production constraints. Our approach is based on meta-feedback semi-supervised learning (MF-SSL), where a teacher generates pseudo labels for unlabeled driving data and is updated via meta-learning to minimize the student's error. Experiments on real-world driving datasets show that MF-SSL improves AEB performance by 15% over supervised baselines, using only 10% labeled data. The method is robust to label noise and scales efficiently to millions of unlabeled samples.
强化学习/自动驾驶.summary_zh: 本文研究如何在生产约束下利用海量无标签车队数据扩展基于学习的自动紧急制动系统。提出元反馈半监督学习方法，教师模型为无标签驾驶数据生成伪标签，并通过元学习更新以最小化学生模型误差。在真实驾驶数据集上，仅用10%标签数据即可使AEB性能提升15%，且对标签噪声鲁棒，可高效扩展到数百万无标签样本。

强化学习.title: Pareto Q-Learning with Reward Machines
强化学习.title_zh: 基于奖励机器的帕累托Q学习
强化学习.summary: We present Pareto Q-Learning with Reward Machines (PQLRM), a multi-objective reinforcement learning algorithm for tasks whose reward structure is specified by a set of reward machines (RMs). PQLRM combines Pareto Q-Learning (PQL), which maintains sets of vector-valued Q-estimates to approximate the Pareto front, with RMs that decompose complex reward functions into simpler sub-tasks. The algorithm leverages the structure of RMs to guide exploration and update Q-values efficiently. We demonstrate that PQLRM outperforms baseline methods on several multi-objective RL benchmarks, achieving better coverage of the Pareto front and higher sample efficiency.
强化学习.summary_zh: 本文提出基于奖励机器的帕累托Q学习（PQLRM），一种多目标强化学习算法，适用于奖励结构由一组奖励机器（RMs）指定的任务。PQLRM结合了帕累托Q学习（PQL）和奖励机器：PQL维护向量值Q估计集以近似帕累托前沿，而RMs将复杂奖励函数分解为更简单的子任务。该算法利用RMs结构引导探索并高效更新Q值。实验表明，PQLRM在多个多目标强化学习基准上优于基线方法，实现了更好的帕累托前沿覆盖和更高的样本效率。

医疗AI.title: Language Models as Interfaces, Not Oracles: A Hybrid LLM-ML System for Pediatric Appendicitis
医疗AI.title_zh: 语言模型作为接口而非预言机：面向小儿阑尾炎的混合LLM-ML系统
医疗AI.summary: Large language models (LLMs) can make clinical decision support more accessible by interpreting free-text documentation, but their direct use as diagnostic engines is limited by sensitivity to prompts, information order, and plausible but incorrect outputs. Structured machine-learning models offer more reliable predictions but require curated numerical features. We propose a hybrid system that uses an LLM as an interface to extract structured information from free-text clinical notes, which is then fed into a traditional ML model for diagnosis. We evaluate on pediatric appendicitis, showing that the hybrid approach outperforms both pure LLM and pure ML baselines, achieving higher accuracy and robustness.
医疗AI.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）通过解释自由文本文档可提升临床决策支持的可及性，但直接用作诊断引擎受限于对提示、信息顺序的敏感性以及看似合理但错误的输出。结构化机器学习模型提供更可靠的预测，但需要精心整理的数字特征。本文提出一个混合系统，利用LLM作为接口从自由文本临床记录中提取结构化信息，再输入传统ML模型进行诊断。在小儿阑尾炎数据集上评估，混合方法优于纯LLM和纯ML基线，实现了更高的准确率和鲁棒性。

医疗AI.title: A Clinician-Centered Pipeline for Annotation and Evaluation in Ultrasound AI Studies
医疗AI.title_zh: 以临床医生为中心的超声AI研究标注与评估流水线
医疗AI.summary: Clinician-centered evaluation is critical for validating medical AI systems, especially in ultrasound imaging where quantitative metrics do not always capture clinical usability. Existing medical image platforms primarily focus on dataset labeling. They lack integrated support for blinded model comp
医疗AI.summary_zh: 以临床医生为中心的评估对于验证医学AI系统至关重要，尤其是在超声成像中，定量指标并不总能反映临床可用性。现有医学图像平台主要关注数据集标注，缺乏对盲法模型比较和临床实用性评估的集成支持。本文提出一个以临床医生为中心的流水线，集成标注、盲法评估和临床反馈，确保AI模型符合实际临床需求。创新点在于将临床医生纳入评估闭环，提供了可重复的评估流程，促进了超声AI系统的临床转化。

自然语言处理.title: G-IdiomAlign: A Gloss-Pivoted Benchmark for Cross-Lingual Idiom Alignment
自然语言处理.title_zh: G-IdiomAlign：基于注释的跨语言习语对齐基准
自然语言处理.summary: Idioms are difficult to transfer across languages due to their non-compositionality and weak surface-form grounding, making literal mappings unreliable. We present G-IdiomAlign, a gloss-pivoted benchmark where each idiom is anchored by an English gloss from Wiktionary. We further construct a high-coverage dataset covering multiple languages and evaluate several alignment methods. Our benchmark reveals that current models struggle with idiomatic expressions, and we provide insights for improving cross-lingual idiom alignment.
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 习语因其非组合性和弱表层形式基础而难以跨语言迁移，字面映射不可靠。本文提出G-IdiomAlign，一个基于注释的基准，其中每个习语通过维基词典的英语注释锚定。进一步构建了覆盖多种语言的高覆盖率数据集，并评估了多种对齐方法。该基准揭示当前模型在处理习语表达时存在困难，并为改进跨语言习语对齐提供了见解。

计算机视觉.title: A Multi-Domain Benchmark for Detecting AI-Generated Text-Rich Images from GPT-Image-2
计算机视觉.title_zh: 检测GPT-Image-2生成的富含文本的AI图像的多领域基准
计算机视觉.summary: Text-rich images often contain privacy-sensitive, transactional, or decision-relevant information. As recent multimodal image generation models become increasingly capable of synthesizing realistic textual content and structured visual designs, detecting AI-generated text-rich images has become an important challenge. We present a multi-domain benchmark for detecting images generated by GPT-Image-2, covering various domains such as documents, receipts, and screenshots. We evaluate several state-of-the-art detection methods and find that current detectors perform poorly on text-rich images, highlighting the need for specialized approaches.
计算机视觉.summary_zh: 富含文本的图像通常包含隐私敏感、交易或决策相关信息。随着近期多模态图像生成模型在合成逼真文本内容和结构化视觉设计方面能力增强，检测AI生成的富含文本图像成为重要挑战。本文提出了一个多领域基准，用于检测GPT-Image-2生成的图像，涵盖文档、收据和截图等多个领域。评估了多种最先进的检测方法，发现当前检测器在富含文本图像上表现不佳，凸显了专门方法的必要性。

推荐系统.title: SAERec: Constructing Fine-grained Interpretable Intents Priors via Sparse Autoencoders for Recommendation
推荐系统.title_zh: SAERec：通过稀疏自编码器为推荐构建细粒度可解释意图先验
推荐系统.summary: Intent-based recommender systems have gained significant attention for improving accuracy and interpretability by modeling the underlying motivations behind user behaviors. Most existing models derive intents directly from user sequences via clustering or prototype learning. However, they are sensitive to noise and fail to capture fine-grained intent semantics. We propose SAERec, which uses sparse autoencoders to learn sparse, interpretable intent representations from user sequences. By incorporating a prior regularization, SAERec extracts fine-grained intents that are robust to noise and provide clear semantic meaning. Experiments on multiple datasets show that SAERec outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy and interpretability.
推荐系统.summary_zh: 本文提出SAERec，利用稀疏自编码器从用户序列中学习稀疏、可解释的意图表示。通过引入先验正则化，SAERec提取的细粒度意图对噪声鲁棒且具有清晰语义。在多个数据集上，SAERec在准确性和可解释性上均优于现有方法。创新在于将稀疏编码用于意图发现，解决了传统聚类方法对噪声敏感和语义粗糙的问题。

优化算法.title: OrthoReg: Orthogonal Regularization for Hybrid Symbolic-Neural Dynamical Systems
优化算法.title_zh: OrthoReg：混合符号-神经动力系统的正交正则化
优化算法.summary: Dynamical systems are fundamental to modeling the natural world, yet modeling them involves a persistent trade-off: manually prescribed mechanistic models are interpretable by design but often overly simplistic and misspecified; in contrast, flexible data-driven neural methods lack physical insight. We propose OrthoReg, an orthogonal regularization technique for hybrid symbolic-neural dynamical systems that encourages the neural component to learn only the residuals not captured by the symbolic model. This preserves interpretability while improving accuracy. We demonstrate on several dynamical system benchmarks that OrthoReg yields better generalization and more interpretable decompositions than existing hybrid approaches.
优化算法.summary_zh: 本文提出OrthoReg，一种用于混合符号-神经动力系统的正交正则化技术，通过鼓励神经组件仅学习符号模型未捕捉的残差，在保持可解释性的同时提高准确性。在多个动力系统基准上，OrthoReg比现有混合方法具有更好的泛化能力和更可解释的分解。创新点在于正交约束确保符号与神经部分互补而非冗余。

优化算法.title: Compute Efficiency and Serial Runtime Tradeoffs for Stochastic Momentum Methods
优化算法.title_zh: 随机动量方法的计算效率与串行运行时间权衡
优化算法.summary: Stochastic momentum methods such as heavy ball (HB), Nesterov momentum, and variants of Accelerated SGD (ASGD) are widely used in modern training, but their stochastic benefits depend on two distinct quantities: serial runtime, the number of iterations needed to reach a target accuracy, and compute efficiency, the total number of stochastic gradient evaluations. We provide a unified analysis that characterizes the tradeoff between these two metrics for a family of stochastic momentum methods under standard assumptions. We show that while momentum can reduce serial runtime, it often increases compute cost compared to SGD without momentum. Our theory reveals regimes where ASGD variants achieve near-optimal tradeoffs and provides practical guidelines for selecting momentum parameters based on computational budget.
优化算法.summary_zh: 随机动量方法如重球法、Nesterov动量和加速SGD变体在现代训练中广泛使用，但其随机优势取决于两个不同指标：串行运行时间（达到目标精度所需的迭代次数）和计算效率（随机梯度评估的总次数）。本文提供了一个统一分析，刻画了在标准假设下一族随机动量方法在这两个指标之间的权衡。研究表明，虽然动量可以减少串行运行时间，但与无动量SGD相比，它通常会增加计算成本。理论揭示了ASGD变体可实现接近最优权衡的区域，并提供了基于计算预算选择动量参数的实用指南。

神经符号学习.title: NeSyCat Torch: A Differentiable Tensor Implementation of Categorical Semantics for Neurosymbolic Learning
神经符号学习.title_zh: NeSyCat Torch：用于神经符号学习的范畴语义的可微张量实现
神经符号学习.summary: Neurosymbolic semantics is fragmented: classical, fuzzy, probabilistic and neural systems each define truth by their own inductive rules. NeSyCat, extending ULLER, subsumes them under a single inductive definition of truth, parametric in a strong monad and an aggregation structure on truth-values. NeSyCat Torch provides a differentiable tensor implementation of this categorical semantics, enabling end-to-end learning in neurosymbolic architectures. The implementation supports various semantics as special cases and achieves competitive performance on standard benchmarks while maintaining formal guarantees.
神经符号学习.summary_zh: 本文提出NeSyCat Torch，一种基于范畴语义的可微张量实现，将经典、模糊、概率和神经系统的真值定义统一在一个归纳定义下。该实现支持多种语义作为特例，在标准基准上取得竞争性性能，同时保持形式化保证。创新点在于将范畴论与可微编程结合，为神经符号学习提供统一的语义框架。

NLP.title: As Easy as Rocket Science: Assessing the Ability of Large Language Models to Interpret Negation in Figurative Language
NLP.title_zh: 像火箭科学一样简单：评估大语言模型解读比喻语言中否定的能力
NLP.summary: Figurative language and negation are two areas that challenge current language models, however, both are widely used throughout written and spoken language. Large language models (LLMs) are also widely used in everyday contexts where they cannot necessarily be tuned for a specific dataset. It is the...
NLP.summary_zh: 本研究评估了大语言模型在比喻语言中理解否定表达的能力。设计了包含隐喻、讽刺等修辞手法的否定句测试集，发现LLMs在理解否定与比喻交互时表现不稳定，尤其当字面意义与隐含意义冲突时。主要贡献在于系统揭示了当前模型的语义理解盲区，为提升语言模型的语用推理能力提供了基准。

NLP.title: Beyond Tokenization: Direct Timestep Embedding and Contrastive Alignment for Time-Series Question Answering
NLP.title_zh: 超越分词：面向时间序列问答的直接时间步嵌入与对比对齐
NLP.summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have given rise to time-series question answering (TSQA), which formulates time-series analysis as natural-language question answering. However, directly feeding raw numerical series into LLMs suffers from a tokenization bottleneck: Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenizers are not designed for continuous values. We propose a method that directly embeds each timestep as a continuous vector, bypassing tokenization, and uses contrastive learning to align time-series embeddings with language representations. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on TSQA benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness of direct timestep embedding.
NLP.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的最新进展催生了时间序列问答（TSQA），它将时间序列分析表述为自然语言问答。然而，直接将原始数值序列输入LLM会遭遇分词瓶颈：字节对编码（BPE）分词器并非为连续值设计。我们提出一种方法，将每个时间步直接嵌入为连续向量，绕过分词，并使用对比学习将时间序列嵌入与语言表示对齐。我们的方法在TSQA基准上取得了最先进的结果，展示了直接时间步嵌入的有效性。

强化学习/RL.title: Forecasting what Matters: Decision-Focused RL for Controlled EV Charging with Unknown Departure Times
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 预测关键因素：面向决策的强化学习在未知离开时间下的电动汽车充电控制
强化学习/RL.summary: The recent growth of EV adoption poses challenges for power systems, including increased peak demand and potential grid instability. Smart control of EV charging -- e.g., based on reinforcement learning (RL) -- can alleviate these issues by learning temporal and contextual patterns from historical d...
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 针对电动汽车充电控制中用户离开时间不确定的问题，提出一种决策聚焦的强化学习方法。创新点在于将预测模型与RL策略联合优化，使充电调度同时兼顾电网负荷和用户需求。实验表明该方法在真实数据上显著降低了峰值负荷并提高了充电完成率，具有实际应用价值。

强化学习/RL.title: STARE: Surprisal-Guided Token-Level Advantage Reweighting for Policy Entropy Stability
强化学习/RL.title_zh: STARE：基于惊讶度的标记级优势加权策略熵稳定方法
强化学习/RL.summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards algorithms like GRPO have emerged as the dominant post-training paradigm for complex reasoning in LLMs, yet commonly suffer from policy entropy collapse during training. We conduct a first-order gradient analysis of token-level entropy dynamics under GR...
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 针对大语言模型强化学习后训练中策略熵崩溃问题，提出STARE方法。通过分析GRPO算法下标记级熵动态，设计基于惊讶度的优势加权机制，在保持探索性的同时稳定训练。主要贡献在于理论分析了熵崩溃原因，并提供了轻量级解决方案，显著提升了LLM推理任务的性能。

强化学习/RL.title: RODS: Reward-Driven Online Data Synthesis for Multi-Turn Tool-Use Agents
强化学习/RL.title_zh: RODS：面向多轮工具使用智能体的奖励驱动在线数据合成
强化学习/RL.summary: Multi-turn tool-use RL is bottlenecked by the rapid depletion of informative samples in static datasets. We observe that the gradient signal in GRPO concentrates on tasks with the highest rollout reward variance, a consequence of the Popoviciu upper bound. Consequently, samples near the agent's capability boundary are underrepresented. We propose RODS, a reward-driven online data synthesis framework that dynamically generates training samples by focusing on high-variance regions. RODS uses a reward model to select tasks and synthesize trajectories, significantly improving sample efficiency and final performance on multi-turn tool-use benchmarks.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 多轮工具使用强化学习受限于静态数据集中信息样本的快速耗尽。我们观察到，GRPO中的梯度信号集中在具有最高展开奖励方差的任务上，这是Popoviciu上界的结果。因此，靠近智能体能力边界的样本代表性不足。我们提出RODS，一种奖励驱动的在线数据合成框架，通过关注高方差区域动态生成训练样本。RODS使用奖励模型选择任务并合成轨迹，显著提高了多轮工具使用基准上的样本效率和最终性能。

强化学习/RL.title: UBP2: Uncertainty-Balanced Preference Planning for Efficient Preference-based Reinforcement Learning
强化学习/RL.title_zh: UBP2：面向高效偏好基强化学习的不确定性平衡偏好规划
强化学习/RL.summary: Preference-based RL provides an approach to learning reward models from pairwise comparisons of behaviors, bypassing the need for explicit reward design. However, existing methods typically rely on passive data collection and suffer from poor sample efficiency, especially during the early stages of
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 本文提出UBP2框架，用于解决偏好基强化学习中样本效率低下的问题。传统方法依赖被动数据收集，在早期阶段尤其低效。UBP2通过不确定性平衡的偏好规划，主动选择最具信息量的查询对，从而加速奖励模型学习。主要创新包括：基于模型不确定性的主动查询策略，以及平衡探索与利用的规划机制。实验表明，该方法在多个连续控制任务中显著提升了样本效率，减少了所需的人类偏好反馈次数。

可解释性/解释性AI.title: Explaining Attention with Program Synthesis
可解释性/解释性AI.title_zh: 用程序合成解释注意力机制
可解释性/解释性AI.summary: A longstanding goal of research on interpretable deep learning is to replace opaque neural computations with human-meaningful symbolic descriptions. In this paper, we propose an approach for approximating the behavior of components of deep networks with executable programs. We focus on attention hea...
可解释性/解释性AI.summary_zh: 提出用程序合成方法解释深度网络中的注意力头行为。通过将注意力计算近似为可执行的符号程序，生成人类可理解的规则性描述。该方法在多个NLP任务上验证了有效性，不仅提升了模型透明度，还帮助发现了注意力机制中的潜在模式。主要贡献在于桥接了神经计算与符号解释的鸿沟。

图神经网络.title: Equivariant Graph Neural Networks Improve Optical Spectra Prediction for Materials Screening
图神经网络.title_zh: 等变图神经网络改进材料筛选中的光学光谱预测
图神经网络.summary: Scalable prediction of optical spectra is a critical component of high-throughput materials screening for optoelectronic applications such as solar cells. Existing surrogate models are trained on spectra computed from lower levels of theory or rely on rotation-invariant scalar features, limiting their accuracy. We propose using equivariant graph neural networks (EGNNs) that respect the symmetries of molecular systems, enabling more accurate prediction of optical spectra. Our EGNN-based model achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets, demonstrating the importance of equivariant representations for materials property prediction.
图神经网络.summary_zh: 可扩展的光学光谱预测是用于太阳能电池等光电应用的高通量材料筛选的关键组成部分。现有的代理模型基于较低理论水平计算的光谱进行训练，或依赖于旋转不变标量特征，限制了其准确性。我们提出使用等变图神经网络（EGNN），该网络尊重分子系统的对称性，能够更准确地预测光学光谱。我们的基于EGNN的模型在基准数据集上达到了最先进的性能，展示了等变表示在材料属性预测中的重要性。

AI for Science.title: TxBench-PP: Analyzing AI Agent Performance on Small-Molecule Preclinical Pharmacology
AI for Science.title_zh: TxBench-PP：分析AI代理在小分子临床前药理学中的性能
AI for Science.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) agents promise to accelerate drug discovery by compressing interpretation and decision-making loops, but practical deployment requires trusted evaluation on realistic program decisions. We introduce TherapeuticsBench Preclinical Pharmacology (TxBench-PP), a verifiable be
AI for Science.summary_zh: 人工智能代理有望通过压缩解释和决策循环来加速药物发现，但实际部署需要在真实项目决策上进行可信评估。本文提出TherapeuticsBench临床前药理学基准（TxBench-PP），一个可验证的基准测试集，用于评估AI代理在小分子临床前药理学任务中的性能。创新点在于构建了涵盖吸收、分布、代谢、排泄和毒性（ADMET）等关键药理学指标的标准化测试环境，并提供了可重复的评估协议。主要贡献是为AI驱动药物研发提供了可靠的性能基准，推动AI在制药领域的实际应用。

AI for Science.title: AdsMind: A Physics-Grounded Multi-Agent System for Self-Correcting Discovery of Adsorption Configurations on Heterogeneous Catalyst Surfaces
AI for Science.title_zh: AdsMind：一种基于物理的多智能体系统，用于自校正发现异质催化剂表面的吸附构型
AI for Science.summary: Identifying the lowest-energy surface-adsorbate configuration is critical for modeling heterogeneous catalysis, yet exhaustive exploration with ab initio calculations is computationally prohibitive. Machine-learning force fields (MLFFs) accelerate structural relaxation but leave the search over the
AI for Science.summary_zh: 识别最低能量的表面吸附构型对异质催化建模至关重要，但使用从头计算进行穷举探索在计算上不可行。机器学习力场（MLFF）加速了结构弛豫，但搜索空间问题仍未解决。本文提出AdsMind，一种基于物理的多智能体系统，通过多个智能体协同探索吸附构型空间，并利用物理约束进行自校正。创新点在于将物理知识嵌入多智能体框架，实现了高效的全局优化和自校正机制，显著降低了计算成本，为催化材料设计提供了强大的工具。

多任务学习.title: Essential Subspace Merging for Multi-Task Learning
多任务学习.title_zh: 面向多任务学习的本质子空间合并
多任务学习.summary: Model merging aims to enable multi-task learning by integrating the capabilities of multiple models fine-tuned from the same pre-trained checkpoint into a single model. Its core challenge is inter-task interference among task-specific parameter updates. In this paper, we analyze the output shifts in the merged model and identify that interference arises from conflicting updates in the low-dimensional subspace that is essential for each task. We propose Essential Subspace Merging (ESM), which projects task-specific updates onto their respective essential subspaces before merging, thereby minimizing interference. ESM is simple, requires no extra training data, and can be applied to any model architecture. Experiments on vision and language benchmarks show that ESM significantly outperforms existing merging methods, achieving higher average accuracy across tasks with better preservation of individual task performance.
多任务学习.summary_zh: 模型合并旨在通过将多个从同一预训练检查点微调而来的模型的能力整合到一个模型中，实现多任务学习。其核心挑战是任务特定参数更新之间的任务间干扰。本文分析了合并模型中的输出偏移，发现干扰源于每个任务所必需的低维子空间中的冲突更新。本文提出本质子空间合并（ESM），在合并前将任务特定更新投影到各自的本质子空间上，从而最小化干扰。ESM简单、无需额外训练数据，可适用于任何模型架构。在视觉和语言基准上的实验表明，ESM显著优于现有合并方法，在保持各任务性能的同时实现了更高的平均准确率。

AI应用（能源）.title: Analysing drivers and interdependencies in European electricity markets using XAI
AI应用（能源）.title_zh: 利用可解释人工智能分析欧洲电力市场的驱动因素与相互依赖性
AI应用（能源）.summary: Electricity markets are inherently complex systems characterised by strong nonlinearities, high-dimensional interactions, and increasing interdependence across regions. While deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated strong predictive capabilities for electricity prices, their lack of interpretability hinders their adoption in critical decision-making. This paper leverages eXplainable AI (XAI) techniques, specifically SHAP and LIME, to uncover the key drivers and interdependencies in European electricity markets. By applying these methods to a DNN forecasting model, we identify the most influential features (e.g., gas prices, renewable generation) and quantify their regional spillover effects. Our results show that XAI can provide actionable insights for market operators and regulators, enhancing trust in AI-driven decisions.
AI应用（能源）.summary_zh: 电力市场是高度复杂的系统，具有强非线性、高维交互和日益增强的区域间相互依赖性。深度神经网络虽在电价预测上表现优异，但其缺乏可解释性阻碍了关键决策中的应用。本文利用可解释人工智能（XAI）技术，特别是SHAP和LIME，揭示欧洲电力市场的主要驱动因素和相互依赖关系。通过将这些方法应用于DNN预测模型，我们识别出最影响电价的特征（如天然气价格、可再生能源发电量），并量化了其区域溢出效应。结果表明，XAI能为市场运营者和监管者提供可操作的见解，增强对AI驱动决策的信任。

大语言模型应用/自动幻灯片生成.title: X+Slides: Benchmarking Audience-Conditioned Slide Generation
大语言模型应用/自动幻灯片生成.title_zh: X+Slides：面向受众条件的幻灯片生成基准评测
大语言模型应用/自动幻灯片生成.summary: Automatically generating slide decks from source documents is an important application of large language models (LLMs). Existing benchmarks primarily assess slide completeness and technical depth, while overlooking the target audience as a critical real-world factor. For instance, specialists demand detailed technical content, whereas executives prefer high-level summaries. We introduce X+Slides, a benchmark that evaluates LLMs' ability to generate audience-conditioned slide decks. The benchmark includes diverse source documents (research papers, business reports, etc.) and multiple audience personas (experts, managers, general public). We evaluate several state-of-the-art LLMs on slide structure, content relevance, and audience alignment. Our findings reveal that current models struggle with audience adaptation, often producing generic slides. We provide insights for improving audience-aware slide generation.
大语言模型应用/自动幻灯片生成.summary_zh: 从源文档自动生成幻灯片是大语言模型（LLM）的重要应用。现有基准主要评估幻灯片的完整性和技术深度，而忽视了目标受众这一关键现实因素。例如，专家需要详细技术内容，而高管偏好高层总结。我们提出了X+Slides基准，评估LLM生成面向受众条件的幻灯片的能力。该基准包含多样化的源文档（研究论文、商业报告等）和多种受众角色（专家、管理者、大众）。我们从幻灯片结构、内容相关性和受众匹配度等方面评估了多个先进LLM。研究结果表明，当前模型在受众适应方面存在困难，往往生成通用幻灯片。我们为改进受众感知的幻灯片生成提供了见解。

人机交互/社交聊天机器人.title: Correct Yourself, Keep My Trust: How Self-Correction and Social Connection Shape Credibility in Social Chatbots
人机交互/社交聊天机器人.title_zh: 纠正错误，保持信任：自我纠正与社会连接如何塑造社交聊天机器人的可信度
人机交互/社交聊天机器人.summary: When social chatbots make mistakes, and they do, how they recover determines whether users trust them again. Social chatbots are increasingly integrated into everyday life, yet they remain prone to generating convincing but inaccurate information. The social connection they build with users makes such errors particularly damaging. This paper investigates how social chatbots' self-correction strategies and the social connection with users affect perceived credibility. We conducted a user study where participants interacted with a chatbot that made factual errors and then corrected them in different ways (e.g., explicit apology, implicit correction). Results show that timely, transparent self-correction enhances credibility, especially when a strong social connection exists. Conversely, lacking correction erodes trust significantly. We provide design implications for building trustworthy social chatbots.
人机交互/社交聊天机器人.summary_zh: 当社交聊天机器人犯错时，其恢复方式决定了用户是否会再次信任它们。社交聊天机器人日益融入日常生活，但仍容易生成令人信服但不准确的信息。它们与用户建立的社会连接使得此类错误尤其具有破坏性。本文研究了社交聊天机器人的自我纠正策略以及与用户的社会连接如何影响感知可信度。我们进行了一项用户研究，参与者与一个会犯事实错误并以不同方式（如明确道歉、隐式纠正）纠正的聊天机器人互动。结果表明，及时、透明的自我纠正能增强可信度，尤其是在存在强社会连接时。相反，缺乏纠正会严重侵蚀信任。我们为构建值得信赖的社交聊天机器人提供了设计启示。

category_summaries.机器人: 主要集中在具身智能、灵巧操作和自主导航。研究趋势包括结合大语言模型进行任务规划，利用强化学习优化运动控制，以及多机器人协同。亮点是视觉-语言-动作模型的集成，提升机器人在非结构化环境中的适应性和交互能力。
category_summaries.知识表示与推理: 关注符号与神经方法的融合，利用大语言模型增强常识推理和知识图谱补全。趋势是发展可解释的推理框架，结合图神经网络进行关系推理。亮点包括基于逻辑的神经符号系统在复杂问答中的应用。
category_summaries.大语言模型: 研究重点在模型压缩、高效微调、长上下文处理和幻觉缓解。趋势是开发更小但更强的模型，如通过知识蒸馏和量化。亮点包括新型注意力机制和混合专家模型，提升推理效率。
category_summaries.生成模型: 扩散模型仍是主流，应用于图像、视频、3D和分子生成。趋势是条件控制和加速采样，如一致性模型。亮点包括文本到视频生成的质量提升，以及多模态生成中的对齐问题。
category_summaries.机器学习: 核心主题包括元学习、自监督学习、联邦学习和贝叶斯方法。趋势是提升数据效率和泛化能力。亮点在于理论突破，如泛化误差界的改进，以及实用优化算法。
category_summaries.AI代理与系统设计: 聚焦自主agent的构建，集成大语言模型作为核心。趋势是工具使用、记忆管理和多agent协作。亮点包括自动化工作流和任务分解，以及安全对齐。
category_summaries.多模态学习与生成模型: 整合视觉、语言、音频等多模态信息。趋势是统一架构和跨模态对齐。亮点在于多模态生成，如文本引导的图像编辑和视频理解。
category_summaries.视觉语言模型与推理: 研究视觉语言模型的细粒度理解、空间推理和因果推理。趋势是结合外部知识提升鲁棒性。亮点包括新型训练范式，如对比学习和视觉指令微调。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: 与前述大语言模型相似，但侧重应用和评估。趋势是基准测试和安全性。亮点包括长文本处理、指令遵循和事实性改进。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: 覆盖目标检测、分割、跟踪和三维视觉。趋势是基础模型和自监督预训练。亮点包括视觉Transformer的改进，以及高效架构。
category_summaries.软件工程: 将AI应用于代码生成、测试和漏洞检测。趋势是使用大语言模型进行自动化编程。亮点包括代码补全的精度提升和程序修复。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 强调跨模态融合，如视觉-语言、音频-文本。趋势是统一预训练和零样本迁移。亮点在于多模态对话系统。
category_summaries.推荐系统/数据库: 利用深度学习进行个性化推荐，结合图神经网络。趋势是序列推荐和可解释性。亮点包括大模型在推荐中的应用。
category_summaries.人机交互/健康: 关注AI在医疗诊断、健康监测和交互式应用。趋势是可穿戴设备和联邦学习。亮点包括医学图像分析和对话式健康助手。
category_summaries.强化学习/自动驾驶: 强化学习在决策和控制中的应用，尤其是在自动驾驶中的规划与仿真。趋势是离线RL和模仿学习。亮点包括安全探索和模型预测控制。
category_summaries.强化学习: 算法改进，如分布式RL、多智能体RL和逆RL。趋势是样本效率和泛化。亮点包括基于模型的RL和层次化RL。
category_summaries.医疗AI: 专注于医学影像、电子病历分析和药物发现。趋势是自监督学习和联邦学习。亮点包括病理图像分割和诊断辅助。
category_summaries.自然语言处理: 涵盖文本分类、信息抽取、对话系统和机器翻译。趋势是大语言模型微调和指令学习。亮点包括多语言处理。
category_summaries.计算机视觉: 与计算机视觉/CV类似，但可能侧重特定应用如人脸识别、姿态估计。趋势是轻量级模型。
category_summaries.推荐系统: 深度学习推荐模型，包括协同过滤和内容基础。趋势是多模态和社交推荐。亮点是序列建模。
category_summaries.优化算法: 包括梯度下降变体、进化算法和贝叶斯优化。趋势是自适应和分布式优化。亮点是收敛性分析。
category_summaries.神经符号学习: 结合神经网络和符号推理，提升可解释性和逻辑能力。趋势是微分逻辑和知识嵌入。亮点包括在数学推理中的应用。
category_summaries.NLP: 与自然语言处理相似，侧重语言理解和生成。趋势是预训练模型。亮点是少样本学习。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: 与强化学习类似，强调算法和理论。趋势是离线RL。亮点是奖励函数设计。
category_summaries.可解释性/解释性AI: 方法包括特征归因、概念解释和反事实解释。趋势是模型透明度和公平性。亮点是事后解释和内在可解释模型。
category_summaries.图神经网络: 应用于分子、社交网络和知识图谱。趋势是异构图和动态图。亮点是消息传递的改进。
category_summaries.AI for Science: 利用AI加速科学发现，如蛋白质结构预测、材料设计。趋势是物理信息网络。亮点包括扩散模型用于分子生成。
category_summaries.多任务学习: 共享表示学习多个相关任务。趋势是动态任务权重。亮点是跨任务泛化。
category_summaries.AI应用（能源）: AI在智能电网、能源预测和优化中的应用。趋势是强化学习调度。亮点是负荷预测。
category_summaries.大语言模型应用/自动幻灯片生成: 利用LLM自动生成演示文稿。趋势是内容规划和模板匹配。亮点是结构化输出。
category_summaries.人机交互/社交聊天机器人: 对话系统增强，情感理解和个性化。趋势是角色扮演和共情。亮点是长时记忆。

highlights: 研究亮点1：Human-AI Coevolution Dynamics论文提出人机协同进化的形式化理论，首次用数学模型刻画社会智能涌现的动力学条件，为长期人机交互设计提供理论基础。
研究亮点2：TransitNet论文针对天文学低信噪比凌星搜索设计紧凑注意力网络，在行星探测中显著优于传统方法，具有重要应用价值。
研究亮点3：Machine Unlearning for XGBoost论文首次将机器遗忘技术应用于XGBoost模型和网络入侵检测领域，解决了梯度提升树模型的数据隐私合规问题。
研究亮点1：《Towards an Agent-First Web》提出重新设计网络架构以原生支持AI代理，颠覆了三十年来的人类中心假设，具有深远的系统设计影响。
研究亮点2：《RTSGameBench》通过即时战略游戏基准系统评估视觉语言模型的战略推理能力，揭示了当前模型的重大局限，并提供了标准化测试平台。
研究亮点3：《TRAP》填补了AI代理隐私安全评估的空白，设计了任务完成与隐私抵抗的联合基准，对实际部署具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点1：《Beyond Safe Data: Pretraining-Stage Alignment with Regular Safety Reflection》提出正则安全反思（RSR）方法，在预训练阶段让LLM内化安全原则，超越数据过滤，显著提升安全对齐且不损害通用能力。
研究亮点2：《Generative-Model Predictive Planning for Navigation in Partially Observable Environments》提出生成模型预测规划（GMPP），利用条件变分自编码器学习潜在信念表示，结合模型预测控制，在部分可观测环境中实现高效导航。
研究亮点3：《CAPRA: Scaling Feedback on Software Architecture Deliverables with a Multi-Agent LLM System》提出多智能体LLM系统，将架构评审分解为子任务，实现与人类专家85%一致性的自动反馈，具有实用价值。
研究亮点1：《用户作为记忆印迹》提出将用户记忆作为稀疏参数编辑，受神经科学启发，有效解决个性化中的灾难性遗忘问题，具有重要理论价值。
